Saga pattern · idempotency · retry · compensation
kompensa
Resilient workflow orchestration for Node.js, browser & React Native.
Zero runtime deps.
TypeScript Node 18+ PostgreSQL Redis React Native ESM + CJS
import { createFlow } from 'kompensa';

const checkout = createFlow('checkout')
  .step('reserve', { run, compensate })
  .step('charge', {
    run, compensate,
    retry: { maxAttempts: 3 },
  })
  .step('invoice', { run });

// idempotent · compensating · crash-safe
await checkout.execute(input, {
  idempotencyKey: 'order-42',
});
npm install kompensa github.com/sirelves/kompensa
